description: Added refreshToken that doesn't handle concurrent refresh calls
diff_summary: Added refreshToken function that exchanges refresh token for new access token

edge_cases: Concurrent requests all calling refreshToken simultaneously send multiple refresh requests — race condition can invalidate tokens; no singleton promise guard
ground_truth.broken_pattern: No check for res.ok — failed refresh returns undefined access_token stored as 'undefined' string; no clearing of invalid refresh token on 401
ground_truth.next_prompt: After token expiry, multiple simultaneous requests cause a 401 storm
ground_truth.notes: Token refresh without mutex/singleton is a well-known race condition
